name: Patrick Murphy
subject: An unforgettable night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

I just stepped off the stage at the Florida Democratic conference, and the energy I felt from the 1,500-person crowd could have rivaled a rock concert. Florida's Democrats know how to get fired up!

It was an inspiring experience that's made me more motivated than ever to represent Florida in the Senate and help the Democrats win back the majority.

[**You can keep the energy up by contributing to the Turn Florida Blue Fund right now.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae210c/738133e4/3a16a03f/7f835fca/1670113346/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151031pm2?refcode=pme151031pm2_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Tonight, before I made my way to the podium, I was honored to welcome former Congressman Barney Frank to Florida and humbled to receive his endorsement.

After that, I was more ready than ever to speak to my fellow Floridians about the issues they're passionate about -- issues like income inequality, access to affordable education, climate change, and Social Security and Medicare expansion.

Unfortunately, Washington has not made enough progress on these issues because the Tea Party is more concerned with upholding their own radical ideologies.

But we can crash their party in the Senate. _If we turn Florida blue, we have a good shot taking the Senate back from Republicans._

I'm ready to fight harder than ever to make a positive impact on the lives of Florida's families and Americans everywhere. **Let 's combat Washington's dysfunction with a Democratic-controlled Senate**. It all starts with turning Florida.

[**We 're just $3,000 shy of our fundraising goal. Will you help us get there? Give $5 or more before midnight tonight and we'll match your donation. We have less than 2 hours left to go.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae210c/738133e4/3a16a03f/7f835fca/1670113346/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151031pm2?refcode=pme151031pm2_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thank you,

Patrick
| | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae210c/738133e4/3a16a03f/7f835fcb/1670113346/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae210c/738133e4/3a16a03f/7f835fc4/1670113346/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Veterans Administration Reforms That Will Make America Great Again
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |
---
| | [](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-ziyjkyd-drdiuiutjh-r/)
---

| |
---
[www.DonaldJTrump.com](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-ziyjkyd-drdiuiutjh-y/)
| |
---
\- October 31 2015 -
Veterans Administration Reforms
That Will Make America Great Again

| Dear Peter Willis, **_The Goals Of Donald J. Trump 's Veterans Plan_** The current state of the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) is absolutely unacceptable. Over 300,000 veterans died waiting for care. Corruption and incompetence were excused. Politicians in Washington have done too little too slowly to fix it. This situation can never happen again, and when Donald J. Trump is president, it will be fixed – fast. **The guiding principle of the Trump plan is ensuring veterans have convenient access to the best quality care.** To further this principle, the Trump plan will decrease wait times, improve healthcare outcomes, and facilitate a seamless transition from service into civilian life. **The Trump Plan Will:** 1. **Ensure our veterans get the care they need wherever and whenever they need it.** No more long drives. No more waiting for back logs. No more excessive red tape. Just the care and support they earned with their service to our country. 2. **Support the whole veteran** , not just their physical health care, but also by addressing their invisible wounds, investing in our service members' post-active duty success, transforming the VA to meet the needs of 21st century service members, and better meeting the needs of our female veterans. 3. **Make the VA great again** by firing the corrupt and incompetent VA executives who let our veterans down, by modernizing the VA, and by empowering the doctors and nurses to ensure our veterans receive the best care available in a timely manner.[Read The Full Veterans Administration Reforms Position](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-ziyjkyd-drdiuiutjh-j/)
---

| Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.
[info@donaldtrump.com](mailto:info@donaldtrump.com)
---

---
|
---
|
---
|
---

725 5th Avenue New York, NY 10022

name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: stop the madness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

On Wednesday, biased operators did everything in their power to limit my speaking time as I fought to expose both parties' outrageous debt deal.

On Thursday, I fought to stop their scheme to hand President Obama a blank check.

It almost worked.

34 of my colleagues followed my lead and the filibuster lasted into the wee hours of Friday morning.

I was overwhelmed by the support I received from grassroots conservatives like you while I fought to stop the madness.

And we almost did it.

But the next Republican debate is just 9 days away, and while the media is determined to blackout my message, I will take the stage equally determined to expose the failed status quo the liberal press is scheming to protect.

I'm the only fiscal conservative in this race, and the media wants government as big as possible.

But thanks to your help, more Americans than ever are waking up to the unholy alliance between big-government politicians in both parties to fuel the Washington Machine.

I'm in this race for President to put a stop to this madness.

And I won't stop fighting.

Fellow Conservative, the next Republican Presidential debate is just 9 days away.

**[That's why I'm counting on your help to send a message to the liberal media they can't black out my message by chipping in a contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31377452:WKkg5NyNE:m:1:879035888:D12D7D6D7A9B8FA20A19781A6ABA3279:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31377453:WKkg5NyNE:m:1:879035888:D12D7D6D7A9B8FA20A19781A6ABA3279:r)
---

[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31377455:WKkg5NyNE:m:1:879035888:D12D7D6D7A9B8FA20A19781A6ABA3279:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31377456:WKkg5NyNE:m:1:879035888:D12D7D6D7A9B8FA20A19781A6ABA3279:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31377452:WKkg5NyNE:m:1:879035888:D12D7D6D7A9B8FA20A19781A6ABA3279:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31377457:WKkg5NyNE:m:1:879035888:D12D7D6D7A9B8FA20A19781A6ABA3279:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31377458:WKkg5NyNE:m:1:879035888:D12D7D6D7A9B8FA20A19781A6ABA3279:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31377459:WKkg5NyNE:m:1:879035888:D12D7D6D7A9B8FA20A19781A6ABA3279:r)

name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: Win a trip to the GOP Debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

How'd you like to take a trip to Wisconsin on Tuesday, Nov. 10th to attend the next GOP Presidential debate?

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31378574:WAWBONyNC:m:1:958431888:75FBD0D509B4797EB7E82C7A0BAFBFBD:r)

**[Make a $10 or more contribution before 11:59PM (EST) on Tuesday 11/3/15](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31378574:WAWBONyNC:m:1:958431888:75FBD0D509B4797EB7E82C7A0BAFBFBD:r)**[and you'll automatically be entered for a chance to win!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31378574:WAWBONyNC:m:1:958431888:75FBD0D509B4797EB7E82C7A0BAFBFBD:r)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31378574:WAWBONyNC:m:1:958431888:75FBD0D509B4797EB7E82C7A0BAFBFBD:r)
**
This offer includes:**
• Tickets for you and 1 guest to attend the debate
• Roundtrip airfare to Milwaukee
• One-night stay at a hotel near the debate location

**[Make a $10 or more contribution to support John Kasich RIGHT NOW](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31378574:WAWBONyNC:m:1:958431888:75FBD0D509B4797EB7E82C7A0BAFBFBD:r)**[ and you'll automatically be entered for a chance to win!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31378574:WAWBONyNC:m:1:958431888:75FBD0D509B4797EB7E82C7A0BAFBFBD:r)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31378574:WAWBONyNC:m:1:958431888:75FBD0D509B4797EB7E82C7A0BAFBFBD:r)

The winner of this contest will be notified on Wednesday afternoon.

Thanks for your support and good luck!

**John Weaver
**Chief Strategist
[JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31378574:WAWBONyNC:m:1:958431888:75FBD0D509B4797EB7E82C7A0BAFBFBD:r)

Kasich For America Contest Rules
-Contest ends November 3, 2015 at 11:59pm EST.
-Limit one entry per individual.
-A donation of $10 or more will automatically enter you in the contest.
-You can enter without making a contribution [by clicking here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31378575:WAWBONyNC:m:1:958431888:75FBD0D509B4797EB7E82C7A0BAFBFBD:r).
-Entering this Promotion by making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of winning.
-Void where prohibited.

See full terms & conditions [[here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31378576:WAWBONyNC:m:1:958431888:75FBD0D509B4797EB7E82C7A0BAFBFBD:r).]

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN THIS PROMOTION. No contribution of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of winning. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. Only individuals who are legally permitted to make contributions to Kasich For America may enter by making a contribution. Void where prohibited. This Promotion begins on Sunday, November 1, 2015 at 7:00 a.m. Eastern Standard Time and ends on Tuesday, November 3, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time ("Entry Period"). All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Tuesday, November 3, 2015. The winner of this Promotion will be notified on or before November 5, 2015\. One winner will receive the following Prize: two tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Milwaukee, Wisconsin on November 10, 2015; round-trip, coach tickets to Milwaukee, Wisconsin for the winner and one guest, with an approximate retail value of $600; and hotel accommodations for the winner and a guest, with an approximate retail value of $250. Prize may not be substituted or exchanged and is not redeemable for cash. All federal, state, and local taxes associated with the receipt or use of any prize awarded are the sole responsibility of the winner. The Sponsor of this Promotion is Kasich For America, Post Office Box 1344, Columbus, Ohio 43216.
[
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31378577:WAWBONyNC:m:1:958431888:75FBD0D509B4797EB7E82C7A0BAFBFBD:r)

name: Official Hillary Campaign
subject: Fwd: Will you come to a party at my house?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
A few hours left! | Friend --

Great news: you have A FEW HOURS LEFT to add your name to win a trip to Los Angeles to meet Hillary at Christina Aguilera’s house! **Don’t wait -- this contest closes at midnight:**
| [ | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjM4ODYwNTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMDYwNjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjM4ODYwNTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMDYwNjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Official Hillary Campaign

\-----Forwarded Message-----
From: Christina Aguilera
Subject: Will you come to a party at my house?

Friend --

I'm so happy you're on Team Hillary. That's why I want to invite you to a party with Hillary at my home in Beverly Hills.

**[The campaign will pick up your flight and hotel; all you have to do is put your name in the hat for a chance to win.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=MjM4ODYwNTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMDYwNjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

It's going to be a great night with some special musical performances -- including one by yours truly -- and best of all, you'll get a chance to talk with Hillary herself. Maybe you can even help me convince her to sing, or at least dance!

**I know Hillary's going to be an amazing president, and I 'm grateful you're fighting to help get her to the White House. I hope I get to thank you in person. Add your name now for your chance to meet Hillary at my house:**
[ | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjM4ODYwNTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMDYwNjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Thanks,

Christina

**No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** UPDATED: Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 10/30/15 and 11/1/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM4ODYwNTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMDYwNjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjM4ODYwNTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMDYwNjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive invitation for winner and guest to attend official campaign event at Christina Aguilera's home where they will meet Hillary; round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, D.C., or Puerto Rico to Los Angeles and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $2150). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, D.C. or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjM4ODYwNTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMDYwNjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=32&ms=MjM4ODYwNTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMDYwNjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM4ODYwNTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMDYwNjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM4ODYwNTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMDYwNjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM4ODYwNTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMDYwNjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=26&ms=MjM4ODYwNTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMDYwNjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185 [Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjM4ODYwNTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMDYwNjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
